caption: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a grey suit jacket over a white shirt and a dark tie, stands at a podium during a presentation. He is positioned to the left of a large screen displaying a presentation slide against a dark blue background. The slide features the title "INDUSTRIAL MACHINE LEARNING" and the subtitle "HORIZONTALLY SCALABLE DATA PIPELINES WITH AIRFLOW". Below this, the name "Alejandro Saucedo" is listed, followed by the handles "@AxSaucedo" and "in/axsaucedo". At the bottom of the frame, a white banner contains the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018". Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, gesturing slightly with his hands as he speaks. The visual elements of the setting, including the background screen and the informational banner, remain static throughout the clip.
